children.heading: Exclusive Commission authority
children.label: a Exclusive Commission authority
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (c), a Federal banking agency may not inspect or examine any registered investment company that is not a bank holding company or a savings and loan holding company.

children.heading: Examination results and other information
children.label: b Examination results and other information
children.text: The Commission shall provide to any Federal banking agency, upon request, the results of any examination, reports, records, or other information with respect to any registered investment company to the extent necessary for the agency to carry out its statutory responsibilities.

children.heading: Certain examinations authorized
children.label: c Certain examinations authorized
children.text: Nothing in this section shall prevent the Corporation, if the Corporation finds it necessary to determine the condition of an insured depository institution for insurance purposes, from examining an affiliate of any insured depository institution, pursuant to its authority under , as may be necessary to disclose fully the relationship between the insured depository institution and the affiliate, and the effect of such relationship on the insured depository institution.section 1820(b)(4) of this title

children.heading: Bank holding company
children.label: 1 Bank holding company
children.text: The term “bank holding company” has the meaning given the term in .section 1841 of this title

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 2 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Securities and Exchange Commission.

children.heading: Corporation
children.label: 3 Corporation
children.text: The term “Corporation” means the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

children.heading: Federal banking agency
children.label: 4 Federal banking agency
children.text: The term “Federal banking agency” has the meaning given the term in .section 1813(z) of this title

children.heading: Insured depository institution
children.label: 5 Insured depository institution
children.text: The term “insured depository institution” has the meaning given the term in .section 1813(c) of this title

children.heading: Registered investment company
children.label: 6 Registered investment company
children.text: The term “registered investment company” means an investment company that is registered with the Commission under the Investment Company Act of 1940 [ et seq.].15 U.S.C. 80a–1

children.heading: Savings and loan holding company
children.label: 7 Savings and loan holding company
children.text: The term “savings and loan holding company” has the meaning given the term in .section 1467a(a)(1)(D) of this title
